use_case: FB-B-01 / S7 / S11 — the persistence span emits structured metadata only: persistence_attempted (bool), persistence_inserted (count), persistence_updated (count), persistence_failed (count), persistence_skipped_reason (enum) plus the docref_uuid prefix. NO clinical values, NO patient identifiers, NO PDF text. Regression that started embedding lab values (e.g. 'persisted LDL=158') into the trace body would trip every PHI denylist pattern at once.

context.trace_text: attach_and_extract span end-meta: outcome=ok, schema_valid=true, cross_check_status=verified, facts_total=14, facts_verified=14, persistence_attempted=true, persistence_inserted=14, persistence_updated=0, persistence_failed=0, persistence_skipped_reason=null, docref_uuid_prefix=a1b2c3d4
